title: 3R3C Project
description: Resourcepack Project Aiming to Implement Guns From a Futuristic Robot-Battles Game called "Robocraft" Into Minecraft!
body:
# This Resourcepack requires Optifine to work!!
# OR You can use "Optifabric" if you used Fabric modloader
## Download Optifine here -> https://optifine.net/downloads
## Download Optifabric here -> https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric

### Resourcepack is still Work In Progress slowly in private...
 

##### 1.12.x Version of 3R3C is discontinued, sorry for the inconvenience...
##### 1.13.x or later versions are now getting universal-implementation, so you can use the pack in any optiifine version from 1.13.x to the lastest version.

### For Shaders Compatibilities Details, Please Scroll Below Item Rename List.


# Introduction
Hello!, Robots and Crafters!
I'm Decostzaza, newbie Texture Artist
This is the 3R3C Resource Pack. I'm aiming to implement guns, blocks and much more (alongside some custom stuff not found in the original game) from the PvP Battle Builder Simulation game called "Robocraft" (Available on Steam!) Into Minecraft! 

Q: How to Obtain These Items?

A: Easy! Just Rename the Items! Most of them are Optifine's Custom Items. (cit for short)

# Items Rename List
## Here's the Rename list per item, (C6 stands for Carbon 6 and they are retextures of the original items) :

# Compatibilities
 
### Optifine Compatibilities : 1.13.x or newer version needed (If you're using Optifabric, it's the same.)

[Optifabric is an "Optifine Loader for Fabric" not "Optifine Fabric Ports/Forks" ,so Optifine is still needed if you've got Optifabric installed.]

### Shader Compatibilities : BSL Shaders by capttatsu (Only BSL compatible in the moment...)
**[DO NOT USE SEUS Shaders, no matter if it was PTGI or Renewed, else This pack WILL BROKE!!]**
 
### Other Resourcepack Compatibilities : Yes, "except resourcepacks with POMs and PBRs*".
[This Resourcepack has PBRs in the pack built-in with the models. mostly being specular map, but not normals map.
so there's a chance of some PBRs/POMs resourcepack loading with 3R3C properly.]


Want to Report Bugs in our Project?, Join our Discord and go to #resourcepack-bugs-report to report a problem you encountered with

(No Items Pictures Available, since there's only 1-2 people working and developing this resource pack, so the process of developing will be very slow. If you are willing to help out, you can join the discord. Apologize for the slow updates [TwT] )
